channel.title: LLM Timeline — RWKV Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from RWKV.

item.title: RWKV-7 Goose (RWKV)
item.description: Parameters: 0.4B License: open Type: model RWKV (pronounced RwaKuv) is an RNN: "multilingual, supporting over 100 languages and code.". Full run is 332B tokens of 3.1T dataset.

item.title: RWKV-v6 Finch (RWKV)
item.description: Parameters: 7.63B License: open Type: model RWKV (pronounced RwaKuv) is an RNN: https://twitter.com/BlinkDL_AI/status/1787834625211158562

item.title: RWKV-v5 EagleX (RWKV)
item.description: Parameters: 7.52B License: open Type: model RWKV (pronounced RwaKuv) is an RNN: Built on the RWKV-v5 architecture (a linear transformer with 10-100x+ lower inference cost)

item.title: RWKV-v5 Eagle 7B (RWKV)
item.description: Parameters: 7.52B License: open Type: model RWKV (pronounced RwaKuv) is an RNN: Built on the RWKV-v5 architecture (a linear transformer with 10-100x+ lower inference cost), Trained on 1.1 Trillion Tokens across 100+ languages. Original paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.13048

item.title: RWKV-4 (RWKV)
item.description: Parameters: 14B License: open Type: model RWKV (pronounced RwaKuv) is an RNN: https://www.reddit.com/r/MachineLearning/comments/yxt8sa/r_rwkv4_7b_release_an_attentionfree_rnn_language/
